message:
feat(fp-frame): add DataFrame groupby integration, sample, and info

DataFrame.groupby(columns) returns DataFrameGroupBy with sum/mean/count/
min/max/std/var/median/first/last/size aggregation methods. Groups are
built with first-seen key ordering and composite key support.
DataFrame.sample(n, frac, replace, seed) for deterministic random sampling
with Fisher-Yates shuffle. DataFrame.info() for summary display.
8 new tests covering groupby aggregations, sampling, and info.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
